form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Not seen since he finished last of 8 at Woodbine All Weather November 22 over 1207m, 15 len behind Ry Pie carrying 55kg at $29.85. On debut second of 7 at Fort Erie May 27 over 1006m, 4 len behind People Are People carrying 54.5kg at $10.40. Returns in a winnable race.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months ran last in a small field at this track on March 26 over 905m, 20 len behind Cold As Hell carrying 55.5kg at $5.70. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at this track on June 19 over 905m, 0.5 len behind Talkin Pharoah carrying 54.5kg at $2. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track March 18 over 905m defeating Optimistic Nate carrying 53kg at $1.70. Before that 4th in a small field at this track on February 13 over 905m, 2.25 len behind Restless with 52kg at $17. Take on trust.

form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Turfway Park on March 5 over 1207m, 18 len behind Fond Farewell with 56kg at $2.21. The run before that 3rd of 7 at Turfway Park on January 7 over 1308m, 6 len behind G T Five Hundred carrying 54.5kg at $2.40. Nicely placed to make amends.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up 3rd in a small field at this track on February 25 over 905m, 1.3 len behind Hey Boots with 55.5kg at $2.90. Second run from a spell 4th in a small field at this track on March 11 over 1408m, 13 len behind Heaven Street carrying 55.5kg at $2.80. Should be near his top.
